briefs.title: Council to Consider: Lochdale School Park Playground Replacement Planned for 2026
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to review site and context maps for a proposed playground replacement at Lochdale School Park, with the upgrade planned for 2026. The maps show the current playground equipment — some dating back to 1989 — and how this site fits into the City's broader park improvement plan.
briefs.action_required: Monitor Burnaby Council meeting updates if your business is near Lochdale School Park for construction impacts.

key_dates.label: Lochdale School Park playground replacement planned completion — Burnaby
